Home About Order Contact

Picao Caldense

Société des sauces

Born from Colombian kitchens where food is shared, remembered, and felt.

Our Philosophy

Picao Caldense is more than a sauce. It is memory, tradition, and identity preserved through flavor.

Craft & Tradition

We believe in slow-crafted flavor, cultural heritage, and the art of bringing people together through authentic cuisine.

Heritage

Every recipe reflects Colombian warmth, family traditions, and a deep respect for culinary craftsmanship.
